name: python3-vadersentiment
title: python3-vadersentiment
summary: lexicon and rule-based sentiment analysis tool (Python 3)
description:
lexicon and rule-based sentiment analysis tool (Python 3)
This package contains VADER (Valence Aware Dictionary and sEntiment Reasoner).
It is a lexicon and rule-based sentiment analysis tool that is specifically
attuned to sentiments expressed in social media.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-vadersentiment because lexicon and rule-based sentiment analysis tool (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-vadersentiment as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-vadersentiment with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-vadersentiment --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
